async_execution.mechanism: Kiro hooks run synchronously; no async execution documented

context_injection.mechanism: Kiro hooks cannot inject context into the agent session

decision_control.mechanism: Kiro hooks are observational; no mechanism to block, allow, or modify tool invocations documented

handler_types.mechanism: Kiro hooks execute shell commands only; no HTTP, LLM prompt, or agent handler types documented

hook_scopes.mechanism: Kiro hooks are project-scoped; no multi-scope configuration documented

input_modification.mechanism: Kiro hooks cannot modify tool input before execution

json_io_protocol.mechanism: Kiro hooks communicate via exit codes; no JSON stdin/stdout protocol documented

matcher_patterns.mechanism: Kiro hooks fire on configured lifecycle events; no per-tool filtering documented

permission_control.mechanism: Kiro hooks do not participate in permission decisions

providerExtensions.name: Predefined agent prompt as hook action
providerExtensions.summary: Hook action type that runs a predefined agent prompt through the Kiro agent instead of a shell command.

providerExtensions.name: Spec task lifecycle triggers (before/after spec task execution)
providerExtensions.summary: Triggers firing before and after spec task execution, tied to Kiro's spec/planning workflow.

providerExtensions.name: Agent turn completion trigger
providerExtensions.summary: Hook trigger that fires after each agent turn completes, enabling automated follow-up actions.

providerExtensions.name: Hooks configured via IDE UI only
providerExtensions.summary: Kiro hooks live as IDE-panel state with no documented file format — configuration is not portable.
